name: hotel event managers processing 5–15 events/month tool
description: For hotel event managers processing 5–15 events/month, inefficient manual processes cause late orders and scheduling conflicts. We automate event planning instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual processes for catering orders and staff scheduling
